key_insights.insight: Persistence is key to overcoming obstacles in achieving success, especially in competitive fields.
key_insights.quote: Just persistence, persistence, persistence. I just didn't stop.

key_insights.insight: Pinning happiness on achieving future goals can be a trap, as reaching one goal often leads to setting another.
key_insights.quote: This is what's dangerous about pinning your happiness or your hopes of happiness on an ever moving goalpost.

key_insights.insight: Being present in the moment and not dwelling on future worries is crucial for enjoying life.
key_insights.quote: I want to be present i want to be able to be here and have a conversation with you to look you in the eye and talk to you without having another shit in my head

key_insights.insight: Enjoying the process of working towards a goal is more important than the final reward.
key_insights.quote: The process is the part of it that you have to enjoy and that's the i think that's the struggle that's why a lot of people don't necessarily find themselves that happy because they're not in situations where they're happy to be doing the work that they're doing to get to where they want to be.

key_insights.insight: Suppression of one's creative output can lead to demotivation and dissatisfaction.
key_insights.quote: When i get suppressed and i'm not able to to to work on music or release music and they kind of go hand in hand because it's kind of weird working on music that you know you can't release.

key_insights.insight: Reframing challenges, like paying a mortgage, can reduce stress by viewing them as simple tasks.
key_insights.quote: My mortgage can be a stress or it can just be a mortgage. I just have to work.

actionable_advice.advice: Limit how far ahead you look at your calendar.
actionable_advice.how_to: Avoid looking at your schedule too far into the future to stay present and avoid unnecessary worry.

actionable_advice.advice: Actively focus on being present in each moment.
actionable_advice.how_to: Practice mindfulness by consciously directing your attention to the current activity or conversation, and gently redirecting your thoughts when they wander to future worries.

actionable_advice.advice: Reframe necessary obligations to reduce stress.
actionable_advice.how_to: Instead of viewing tasks like paying bills as stressful burdens, see them as simple actions you need to take.

memorable_stories: The guest's experience of signing to Mike Skinner's record label and the deal falling apart due to creative differences and label financing issues.
The guest's mentor advising him to enjoy the moment.
contrarian_claims: The guest's initial belief that musical success would solve all his problems and make him happy proved to be false.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Moment 21 - Professor Green on The Source Of Your Success
